articles.title: No deal announced after Trump meeting to make 'final determination' on Iran
articles.summary: The US president met his advisers, after officials confirmed the US and Iran had agreed a framework of a deal.

articles.title: US, UK and Australia to develop underwater drone technology
articles.summary: The technology, developed under the Aukus military pact, is aimed at protecting undersea cables and boosting naval defence.

articles.summary: Local authorities say the cancellation of other West concerts had played a role in the decision.

articles.title: Ebola spread in DR Congo 'alarming', charity warns, as WHO chief visits worst-hit area
articles.summary: Médicins Sans Frontières says that never before has an Ebola outbreak recorded so many cases so soon after its declaration.

articles.title: Spain's Sánchez digs in after eight years as PM as wave of scandals threatens survival
articles.summary: Corruption probes of colleagues and relatives have put Spain's premier into a fight for survival.

articles.summary: The testimony comes about a month after America's top prosecutor was ousted by US President Donald Trump.
